title: 2026-03-16 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 30.37
description: Daily pressure check for 2026-03-16: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 30.37/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
